label: Health Factor Monitor
description: Real-time health factor monitoring across lending positions. Shows oracle vs market rates, spread, and emergency exit trigger.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Loading: React.Suspense in widget-wrapper covers suspend; context always provides hydrated static data (no async loading path).

0.7.note: Empty: emergencyExit.steps uses .map() which is safe on empty array; HF data is a single object always present.

0.8.note: Error: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper catches render errors.

0.9.note: removed unused Eye import from lucide-react.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx (line 89). 0.2 requiredEntitlements=["execution-basic","execution-full"] non-empty. 0.3 availableOn=["defi"] non-empty. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 Loading: React.Suspense in widget-wrapper covers suspend; context always provides hydrated static data (no async loading path). 0.7 Empty: emergencyExit.steps uses .map() which is safe on empty array; HF data is a single object always present. 0.8 Error: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper catches render errors. 0.9 Fixed: removed unused Eye import from lucide-react.

1.1.note: Widget reads all data via useDeFiData() hook only — no inline fetches or direct imports.

1.2.note: defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 188) and filters by scope.

1.3.note: Org filter: hasDefiDesk derived from organizationIds — controls adjustedTokenBalances, adjustedLendingProtocols, getBridgeRoutes. healthFactorDashboard and emergencyExit are strategy-level constants not org-scoped (correct — HF is per-strategy, not per-org).

1.4.note: Client filter: no client-level filtering in context; this widget operates at strategy/protocol level where client cascade is N/A.

1.5.note: Strategy filter: scopeStrategyIds applied to tradeHistory (line 211). HF dashboard is a single strategy snapshot — strategy-level scoping N/A for this specific field.

1.6.note: Empty organizationIds → hasDefiDesk=true, full data returned. Empty strategyIds → all tradeHistory returned.

1.7.note: MOCK_HEALTH_FACTOR and MOCK_EMERGENCY_EXIT are mock fixture constants in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough (context responsibility, not widget). Widget itself has no direct mock imports.

HF dashboard is a single strategy snapshot — strategy-level scoping N/A for this specific field. 1.6 Empty organizationIds → hasDefiDesk=true, full data returned. Empty strategyIds → all tradeHistory returned. 1.7 MOCK_HEALTH_FACTOR and MOCK_EMERGENCY_EXIT are mock fixture constants in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough (context responsibility, not widget). findings.description: Unused Eye import from lucide-react was present in the widget file.

healthFactorDashboard and emergencyExit mock data live in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-walkthrough (imported by context, not widget). These are strategy-specific snapshots with no org/client filter applied — acceptable for current mock stage; will need live data wiring in L2/L3.
